name: Kyoto Kimono Yuzen Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kyoto Kimono Yuzen Co.,Ltd. engages in the sale of kimono, jewelry, and other products in Japan. The company operates 49 stores. It also rents furisode kimonos. The company was formerly known as Marukawa Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Kyoto Kimono Yuzen Co.,Ltd. in 1989. Kyoto Kimono Yuzen Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
